rows.description: Tubbs's Bill for Oil -
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings from consensus. Pence read as '2' with a faint '1/4' (farthing) mark following it, visually overriding both extractors. Gemini-flash (R31) interpreted it as whole '2' pence with a non-standard tick, while gpt-5-mini (R24) interpreted it as '2' pence with '0.5' fraction. The mark is distinct enough to be a farthing 'q'. Description 'Tubbs's' from gemini-flash is accurate, contra gpt-5-mini's 'Tubble's'.
rows.english_description: Tubbs's bill for oil (lighting/fuel).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Tubbs's bill for oil (lighting/fuel), amounting to £11 8s 2¼d.
